Field Label:
Amount Scale (AS):
0: Did not use use weaker arm
1: Very rarely (1/10th as much as before stroke)
2: Rarely (1/4 as much)
3: Half as much (1/2 as much)
4: Often (3/4 as much)
5: Same as before stroke

How Well Scale (HW):
0: Weaker arm not used at all
1: Very poorly, arm used only slightly
2: Poorly, arm used but weak/slow
3: Fairly well, some difficulty
4: Almost normal, slight difficulty
5: Normal (same as before stroke)

'If no, why?' Codes:
1: Weakness/Disability
2: Someone else did it
3: Pain
4: Forget/Dominant hand habit
5: Other
